narrative:
Canaan Township has 632 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
